elements.text:
You are at a restaurant with some friends and go to use the restroom. When you come back to the table your friends are at, they stop their conversation and it's silent. 

Here are some thoughts that might pop into mind:

texts: I looked good in the mirror on my way out of the bathroom.
You think they might have heard you going to the bathroom, but remind yourself that it isn’t a big deal.
My friends might have been talking about me, but that doesn’t mean they were saying something bad.
